message.content:
Explore the harness structure in this project (/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system). Look for:

1. .harness/ directory structure if it exists
2. claude-progress.txt or progress.txt files
3. features.json structure and format
4. Any harness-related documentation

The goal is to understand the harness pattern used here so it can be replicated in a new project. Focus on the file formats and their purposes.

content.text: Entendi. Vou explorar a estrutura do harness neste projeto. Deixa eu começar procurando os arquivos e diretórios relevantes.

input.description: Search for harness-related files and progress tracking
List hidden directories and files in project root
List all files and directories in project root
